summary: Completed testing of Recruiter Onboarding Flow (iteration 4). All 13 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend UI flow from Steps 0-6 verified. Badges appear at steps 1 (company_live), 3 (sourcing_ready), 6 (ready_to_hire). Confetti animation works. Account is correctly updated with company info from Step 1. After completion, recruiter sees normal dashboard.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - endpoint may not be implemented yet
minor.note: Existing issue from iteration 3, not related to recruiter onboarding

critical_code_review_comments: Recruiter onboarding correctly differentiates from job seeker onboarding using user.role check
Step 1 company info correctly updates the account document (not just user)
Badge gamification working: company_live at step 1, sourcing_ready at step 3, ready_to_hire at step 6
Step 4 correctly has two CTAs instead of Continue button - action_taken is saved
seed_data_creation: None - tested with existing seed data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Recruiter onboarding flow fully tested. All 7 steps (0-6) working correctly. Badges awarded at correct steps. Account updated with company info from Step 1. After completion, recruiter sees normal dashboard. The user careers@fintechsa.co.za has completed onboarding - to test again, onboarding_completed needs to be reset to false/null in the database.

recruiter_login_redirects_to_onboarding.details: Recruiters with onboarding_completed=null/false are redirected to /onboarding

admin_login_no_redirect.details: Admin login goes directly to Admin Dashboard, not onboarding

job_seeker_login_works.details: Job seekers work with job seeker onboarding (tested in iteration 3)

step0_welcome_screen.details: Welcome screen shows user's first name, emerald/green theme, 'Set up my account' and 'Skip for now' buttons

step0_setup_advances.details: 'Set up my account' button advances to Step 1

step0_skip_completes.details: 'Skip for now' calls POST /api/onboarding/skip and redirects to dashboard

step1_company_basics.details: Company name, size (6 options), industry dropdown, location input all work

step1_saves_to_account.details: PUT /api/onboarding/step/1 updates account with company_name->name, company_size, company_industry, company_location

step2_hiring_preferences.details: Roles with autocomplete suggestions, locations with SA cities, employment types, hiring volume

step3_candidate_access.details: Sourcing method toggles (Applicants, Talent Pool, AI Matching), alerts toggle, match preference

step4_activate_two_ctas.details: Two CTAs: 'Post my first job' and 'Browse candidates' - no Continue button. Clicking CTA saves action_taken and advances

step5_distribution.details: Email, WhatsApp, Social Media distribution toggles work

step6_go_live.details: Shows 'Everything looks great!' with Company Live, Sourcing Ready, Dashboard Ready icons. Go Live button completes

completion_confetti.details: Confetti animation displays on completion. 'You're ready to hire!' message with 'Go to Dashboard' button

after_completion_dashboard.details: After completion, recruiter sees normal Recruiter Dashboard with company profile form

back_button.details: Back button present on each step, navigates to previous step

badge_step1_company_live.details: Badge popup 'Company Profile Live' appears after completing step 1

badge_step3_sourcing_ready.details: Badge popup 'Sourcing Ready' appears after completing step 3

badge_step6_ready_to_hire.details: Badge popup 'Ready to Hire' appears after completing step 6

onboarding_api_saves_recruiter_fields.details: Backend correctly saves recruiter-specific fields: hiring_roles, hiring_locations, hiring_employment_types, hiring_volume, sourcing_methods, alerts_enabled, match_preferences, distribution_email/whatsapp/social

account_updated_from_step1.details: Account document updated with company info - verified via GET /api/account

mocked_integrations.payfast: Sandbox mode - Payfast payment gateway is in sandbox mode for testing
